title: onobrychis gracilis
intro: Onobrychis gracilis, also known as slender birdsfoot or slender sainfoin, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis gracilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support cardiovascular health. Onobrychis gracilis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal infusions and salves.
